Pamela Pitt, Esq., of the Law Office of Pamel Pitt, Tel. 415.291.9251, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
Clarice Liu, Esq., of Bragg & Kuluva, Tel. 415.273.6500, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF JUANA PASCUBELLO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is Denied. There are triable issues whether plaintiff was disabled and whether defendant had knowledge of the claimed disability. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Randall J. Lee, Esq., of Walsworth Franklin Bevins & McCall, LLP, Tel. 415.481.7072, appearing for Defendant and moving party.
Pamela Pitt, Esq., of the Law Office of Pamel Pitt, Tel. 415.291.9251, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. The racial harassment cause of action fails because the defendant was not plaintiff's employer, none of defendant's employees engaged in the misconduct, and there is no evidence that defendant aided or abetted the misconduct. The section 51.7 cause of action fails because there is no evidence that defendant engaged in any misconduct. The negligent infliction of emotional distress cause of action fails because it is not a distinct cause of action. Plaintiff's request to file a motion for leave to amend is granted. Order signed in open Court. Judgment shall be signed on or before March 29, unless before that time Plaintiff is granted leave to amend. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
